name: brand-gallery
description: Sponsor-page image gallery. Reads the resolved image URLs from $ctx['sponsor'].gallery_urls (Lane-A baked these as URLs, not attachment IDs — so unlike the `gallery` block it needs no media resolver). Renders a horizontal lightbox carousel (reuses the shared [data-lg-carousel] + [data-lg-lightbox] front-end). Optional `heading`. Empty gallery_urls → block renders nothing. Auto-themes via --brand-primary.

heading.description: Section heading shown above the carousel (inline-editable).
